creator: jb.1234abcd@gmail.com
text:
I always update my system with:
# portsnap fetch update
# portmaster -L --index-only | egrep '(ew|ort) version|total install'
# portmaster <port>

I recreated /usr/ports from scratch this time:
# rm -rf /usr/ports/*
# portsnap fetch extract
# portsnap fetch update

After that both worked:
/usr/ports/sysutils/e2fsprogs # make clean; make; make install; make clean
and
# portmaster e2fsprogs

Something was screwed up in /usr/ports.
Thanks for your time.
